query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.claim_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.accident_type,
  a.confidence_score,
  (CASE WHEN a.causal_chain_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_causal_chain,
  (CASE WHEN a.physics_analysis IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_physics,
  (CASE WHEN a.forensic_analysis IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_forensic,
  (CASE WHEN a.causal_verdict_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_causal_verdict,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.causal_chain_json IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.accident_type,
  a.confidence_score,
  (CASE WHEN a.causal_chain_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_causal_chain,
  (CASE WHEN a.physics_analysis IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_physics,
  (CASE WHEN a.forensic_analysis IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_forensic,
  (CASE WHEN a.causal_verdict_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_causal_verdict,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.causal_chain_json IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
